title: lotus corniculatus var. longisiliquosus
intro: Lotus corniculatus var. longisiliquosus is a variant of the Lotus corniculatus plant, commonly known as bird's-foot trefoil, a legume native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Lotus corniculatus var. longisiliquosus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to leverage its medicinal properties.
